response.original_title: En la Escuela de Bellas Artes
response.overview: Newsreel from the 1940s about the closing of the school year at the National School of Fine Arts and the awards ceremony for outstanding students, which was attended by the Minister of Education, Eng. Enrique Laroza, and the Minister of Development, Eng. Alberto Jochamowitz, as president of the board of directors.
response.title: En la Escuela de Bellas Artes
